name: Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together flour, 3 tablespoons yellow cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Stir together beaten egg yolk, milk, and cooking oil.
4. Add all at once to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
5. Line two 6-ounce custard cups with paper baking cups.
6. Fill cups about 2/3 full.
7. Sprinkle a little additional cornmeal atop muffins.
8. Bake uncovered on 100% power for about 45 seconds or until done (a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean).
